products.title: Dyeing
products.summary: Controlled colour science for repeatable shades and robust fastness.
products.description: Our dyeing approach emphasizes recipe discipline and machine parameters matched to fibre class.
products.body: Our dyeing approach emphasizes recipe discipline and machine parameters matched to fibre class.

products.title: Textile Processing
products.summary: End-to-end preparation and treatment sequences for woven.
products.description: From desizing and scouring through specialized treatments for dyeing, printing, or finishing.
products.body: From desizing and scouring through specialized treatments for dyeing, printing, or finishing.

products.title: Cotton Processing
products.summary: Natural-fibre expertise with emphasis on handle and lustre.
products.description: Cotton programmes balance cleaning, bleaching, and dye uptake.
products.body: Cotton programmes balance cleaning, bleaching, and dye uptake.

products.title: Polyester Cotton Processing
products.summary: Blend-aware parameters for even dye distribution.
products.description: Polycot workflows account for differential dye affinity and thermal sensitivity.
products.body: Polycot workflows account for differential dye affinity and thermal sensitivity.

products.title: Viscose Fabric Processing
products.summary: Low-tension, moisture-aware handling for regenerated cellulosics.
products.description: Viscose processing emphasizes gentle mechanical action and controlled chemistry.
products.body: Viscose processing emphasizes gentle mechanical action and controlled chemistry.

products.title: Lyocell Processing
products.summary: Precision processing for premium hand-feel and colour clarity.
products.description: Lyocell programmes prioritize fibrillation control and finishing selection.
products.body: Lyocell programmes prioritize fibrillation control and finishing selection.

products.title: Cotton Lycra Processing
products.summary: Stretch constructions processed with recovery in mind.
products.description: Elastane-inclusive fabrics are run with tension discipline and heat management.
products.body: Elastane-inclusive fabrics are run with tension discipline and heat management.

products.title: Textile Printing
products.summary: Rotary printing for bold graphics at production scale.
products.description: Printing operations supported by robust preparation and finishing.
products.body: Printing operations supported by robust preparation and finishing.

products.title: Fabric Finishing
products.summary: Final treatments that define hand-feel and performance.
products.description: Finishing stabilizes dimensions and aligns fabric performance to specification.
